chapter: Chapter 5: The Fundamental Unit of Life

questions.question: What is a cell?
questions.answer: A cell is the basic structural and functional unit of life.

questions.question: Who discovered the cell?
questions.answer: Robert Hooke discovered the cell in 1665.

questions.question: Name the instrument used to observe cells.
questions.answer: Cells are observed using a microscope.

questions.question: What is the plasma membrane?
questions.answer: The plasma membrane is the outer covering of the cell.

questions.question: What is diffusion?
questions.answer: Diffusion is the movement of substances from higher concentration to lower concentration.

questions.question: What is osmosis?
questions.answer: Osmosis is the movement of water across a selectively permeable membrane.

questions.question: Which structure is present only in plant cells?
questions.answer: The cell wall is present only in plant cells.

questions.question: What is the function of the cell wall?
questions.answer: The cell wall provides support and protection to plant cells.

questions.question: What is the nucleus?
questions.answer: The nucleus is the control center of the cell.

questions.question: What is cytoplasm?
questions.answer: Cytoplasm is the jelly-like substance inside the cell.

questions.question: Which organelle is called the powerhouse of the cell?
questions.answer: Mitochondria are called the powerhouse of the cell.

questions.question: Which organelle performs photosynthesis?
questions.answer: Chloroplast performs photosynthesis.

questions.question: What is the function of ribosomes?
questions.answer: Ribosomes help in protein synthesis.

questions.question: Which organelle packages and transports materials in the cell?
questions.answer: Golgi apparatus packages and transports materials.

questions.question: Which organelle contains digestive enzymes?
questions.answer: Lysosomes contain digestive enzymes.

questions.question: Which cells lack a nuclear membrane?
questions.answer: Prokaryotic cells lack a nuclear membrane.

questions.question: Which cells have a well-defined nucleus?
questions.answer: Eukaryotic cells have a well-defined nucleus.

questions.question: What are chromosomes?
questions.answer: Chromosomes are structures that carry genetic information.

questions.question: What is DNA?
questions.answer: DNA is the molecule that carries genetic information.

questions.question: What is a gene?
questions.answer: A gene is a functional unit of DNA responsible for traits.

questions.question: What is cell division?
questions.answer: Cell division is the process by which a cell forms new cells.

questions.question: What is mitosis?
questions.answer: Mitosis is cell division that produces two identical daughter cells.

questions.question: What is meiosis?
questions.answer: Meiosis is cell division that produces four daughter cells with half chromosomes.

questions.question: Which organelle stores substances in plant cells?
questions.answer: Vacuoles store substances in plant cells.

questions.question: Give one example of a unicellular organism.
questions.answer: Amoeba is an example of a unicellular organism.
